column1: 会議は月曜日、あるいは火曜日に行う予定です。
column2: かいぎはげつようひ、あるいはかようひにおこなうよていです。
column3: The meeting is scheduled to take place on Monday or alternatively Tuesday.
column5: A + あるいは + B (conjunction: or/alternatively) / あるいは + Clause (possibly, perhaps)
column6: presenting an alternative option or possibility; more formal than または; also used sententially for 'possibly'
column8: あるいは = formal alternative/possibility; または = or (neutral); もしくは = or (written formal); か = or (sentence-internal particle)
